  • Uses of Frequency in org.episteme.natural.chemistry

    Methods in org.episteme.natural.chemistry that return types with arguments of type Frequency
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Quantity<Frequency>
    ChemicalReaction.calculateRateConstant(Quantity<Temperature> temperature)
    Calculates the reaction rate constant k using the Arrhenius equation. k = A * exp(-Ea / (R * T))

    ControlSystems.firstOrderPhase(Quantity<Frequency> omega, Quantity<Frequency> omegaCutoff)
    Bode phase for first-order system.

    ControlSystems.peakTime(Quantity<Frequency> wn, Real zeta)
    Peak time for second-order underdamped system. tp = Ï€ / wd

    ControlSystems.riseTime(Quantity<Frequency> wn, Real zeta)
    Rise time estimate for second-order system. tr â‰ˆ (Ï€ - Ï†) / wd

    static Quantity<Frequency>
    HarmonyEngine.calculateFrequency(int semitonesFromA4)

    Note.getFrequency()
    Returns frequency as a Real-based Quantity. f = 440 * 2^((n - 69 + cents/100) / 12)
